<script lang="ts">
  import { cn, type WithElementRef } from "$lib/utils.js"
  import type { HTMLAttributes } from "svelte/elements"

  let {
    ref = $bindable(null),
    class: className,
    children,
    ...restProps
  }: WithElementRef<HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>> = $props()
</script>

<kbd
  bind:this={ref}
  data-slot="kbd-group"
  class={cn("cn-kbd-group inline-flex items-center", className)}
  {...restProps}
>
  {@render children?.()}
</kbd>

<script lang="ts">
  import { cn, type WithElementRef } from "$lib/utils.js"
  import type { HTMLAttributes } from "svelte/elements"

  let {
    ref = $bindable(null),
    class: className,
    children,
    ...restProps
  }: WithElementRef<HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>> = $props()
</script>

<kbd
  bind:this={ref}
  data-slot="kbd"
  class={cn(
    "cn-kbd pointer-events-none inline-flex items-center justify-center select-none",
    className
  )}
  {...restProps}
>
  {@render children?.()}
</kbd>
